tluaNoGenerators.tlua(4,18): error TLUA2693: 'unknown' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(5,3): error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(5,3): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'yield'.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(6,3): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'yield'.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(6,10): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'more'.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(9,15): error TLUA2393: Duplicate function implementation.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(9,15): error TLUA1003: Identifier expected.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(9,17): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'asyncGen'.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(9,27): error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(9,29): error TLUA2693: 'unknown' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(10,3): error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(10,3): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'yield'.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(14,3): error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(14,4): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'method'.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(14,13): error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(15,5): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'yield'.
tluaNoGenerators.tlua(15,11): error TLUA1005: ',' expected.


==== tluaNoGenerators.tlua (21 errors) ====
    // Generators are removed in tlua: `function*`, `yield`, `yield*`, and async
    // generators no longer parse. Use the Lua coroutine library directly instead.
    
    function* gen(): unknown
            
!!! error TLUA2393: Duplicate function implementation.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1003: Identifier expected.
              ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'gen'.
                   ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                     ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'unknown' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
      yield 1;
      ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
      ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'yield'.
      yield* more;
      ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'yield'.
             ~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'more'.
    end
    
    async function* asyncGen(): unknown
                  
!!! error TLUA2393: Duplicate function implementation.
                  ~
!!! error TLUA1003: Identifier expected.
                    ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'asyncGen'.
                              ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                                ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'unknown' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
      yield 4;
      ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
      ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'yield'.
    end
    
    local obj = {
      *method() {
      ~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
       ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'method'.
                ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
        yield 5;
        ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'yield'.
              ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
      },
    };
    
    // `yield` is now an ordinary identifier.
    function usesYieldName(): number
      local yield = 7;
      return yield;
    end
